title: TOTP (Time-Based One-Time Password) Setup and Troubleshooting
text:
Q: How do I set up and troubleshoot TOTP for my account?
A: To set up TOTP, first, download a TOTP authenticator app like Google Authenticator or Authy on your mobile device. Windows: Open your web browser and log into your company account. Navigate to the security settings and select 'Enable Two-Factor Authentication.' macOS: Similarly, open your web browser, log into your company account, and go to the security settings to enable 'Two-Factor Authentication.' You will see a QR code on the screen. Windows: Open your authenticator app and select 'Add Account' or the '+' icon to scan the QR code. macOS: Follow the same process in your authenticator app. After scanning, the app will generate a 6-digit code. Enter this code back on your company account to complete the setup. If you encounter issues, ensure your device's time settings are accurate, as TOTP relies on time synchronization. Windows: Check your time settings by right-clicking the time in the taskbar, selecting 'Adjust date/time,' and ensuring 'Set time automatically' is enabled. macOS: Go to 'System Preferences,' select 'Date & Time,' and ensure 'Set date and time automatically' is checked. If problems persist, try resetting the authenticator app or contact IT support for further assistance.
